curation_notes: Patch commit is the merge of PR #4603 into master. Only one source file changed (executor/stubs.go), modifying the MountStubsCleaner function to add fs.RootPath validation ensuring paths remain within the container root after execution, and a boundary check on the parent directory traversal loop. Location derived directly from the patch diff. No sibling files share the same vulnerability pattern. Pre-assigned class path-traversal confirmed by CWE-22 and patch adding path containment checks.
